metadata.title:
BILL FIGHT


TO BEGIN NEXT WEEK

pages.raw_text:
OLYMPIA. Wash. Feb. 6.-The
Tolman-Dix railroad commission bill
went on the house calender today and
will probably be reached next week.
The senate has made the commits
sion bill special order for next
Wednesday. so it seems certain the
fight will be on in both houses next
week.


1t Is claimed the bill will be defeat
ed in the senate. but it's fate in the
house is problematical. Friends of
the measure claim they will force its
passage in that branch of the legis-
lature. The house committee did not
discuss the matter yesterday.


On the roll call the committee
stood as follows:


For the bill-Wilson of Kittitas
(chairman), Whitney of Spokane.
Howard of Lincoln. Witter of Whit
man. zenkner of Lewis. Butler of
